popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of Elizabeth Whetman
popularStory.description: Elizabeth was born about 1533 in England. She married John Brooke on May 8, 1554.  They were married for 30 years and probably lived in London.  John died in July 1584.  Elizabeth was a widow for …

zh.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whetman於大約1535年出生在英國。她於1554年5月8日與John Brooke在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年6月30日之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普。

zh-hans.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: 英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whetman于大约1535年出生在英国。她于1554年5月8日与John Brooke在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1599年6月30日之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普。

nameMeanings.name: Whetman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Weetman
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Wet(e)man, Wat(e)man (Old English Hwætmann, formed from hwæt ‘active, bold, brave’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whetman was born about 1535, in England. She married John Brooke on 8 May 1554, in London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died before 30 June 1599, in her hometown, and was buried in London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, England.

Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée avant 30 juin 1599, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ja.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップ
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whetmanは約1535年にイギリスで生まれた。1554年5月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップでJohn Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1599年6月30日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップにて埋葬された。

ko.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whetman(은)는 대략 1535년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1554년 5월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프에서 John Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 6월 30일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whetman nasceu aproximadamente 1535, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Brooke em 8 de maio de 1554, em London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 30 de junho de 1599, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Whetman родилась около 1535 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Brooke 8 мая 1554 г. в местности лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла перед 30 июнь 1599 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия.
